title: S.H.
content:
With beams December planets dart
    His cold eye truth and conduct scanned,
    July was in his sunny heart,
    October in his liberal hand.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Ralph Waldo Emerson delivers a powerful performance in "S.H."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
